package rulecoverage

func NegativePrometheusCounterCreatedPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "prometheus_counter_created_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`prometheus.NewCounter(prometheus.CounterOpts{...})` inside handler functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
